Subject: App is slow on mobile
Body: The app takes 10 seconds to load on my phone. Our sales team is frustrated because they lose deals while waiting.

Subject: Missing feature - bulk export
Body: We need a way to export data in bulk. Currently can only export one record at a time which is killing our productivity.

Subject: No mobile app
Body: Your web app doesn't work well on mobile. We need a native iOS app. 60% of our usage is on mobile.

Subject: Onboarding is confusing
Body: New team members spend 2 hours trying to understand how to use the dashboard. We need better documentation or tutorials.

Subject: Integration with Slack needed
Body: We manage 10 projects but have to manually update Slack. A Slack integration would save us 5 hours per week.

Subject: Too expensive for smaller teams
Body: Your pricing is great for enterprises but small nonprofits like us can't afford it. We switched to a competitor.

Subject: Data accuracy issues
Body: The analytics dashboard shows different numbers than our source system. We can't trust the insights.

Subject: Need customizable reports
Body: We can't customize reports to match our internal reporting format. Would need to export and manipulate in Excel.
